race.comment: WIND RUSH (6) looks to have found a suitable opportunity after a series of consistent efforts this preparation. While it's been a while since his last win, he has been knocking on the door and gets his chance to break through here. HARD LEAF (1) arrives in good form and is hard to fault, although this represents a tougher assignment than recent starts. STOLEN KISS (14) has been thereabouts of late and is capable of making her presence felt again. MAXILDO (5) won over a similar trip two starts ago before a solid third at this track and distance last time and also warrants consideration in an open contest.
